use_cases: Two-factor authentication verification for secure login flows
Phone or email verification during account registration
Payment confirmation with one-time passcode entry
Password reset or account recovery verification
ai_summary: A secure OTP (One-Time Password) input component with animated success and error states. Features spring-based animations using Framer Motion for verification feedback, including a checkmark reveal on successful validation and error messaging for incorrect entries. Designed for authentication and verification workflows across fintech, SaaS, and e-commerce platforms.
